label: japanese_ETP_placebo
comments: Endogenous Thrombin Potential; total amount of thrombin generated over time

label: japanese_LAG_placebo
comments: Lag Time; delay before thrombin generation begins

label: japanese_PEAK_placebo
comments: Peak Thrombin; maximum thrombin concentration reached

label: japanese_TTP_placebo
comments: Time to Peak; time required to reach peak thrombin concentration

label: japanese_mPT_placebo
comments: modified Prothrombin Time; clotting time of the extrinsic pathway

label: japanese_inr_placebo
comments: International Normalized Ratio; standardized measure of prothrombin time

label: japanese_aPTT_placebo
comments: Activated Partial Thromboplastin Time; clotting time of the intrinsic and common pathway
